ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the data type (e.g., Primitive, Complex) */,
  "is_primitive" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data type is a primitive type */,
  "is_complex" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data type is a complex type */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type used by the object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "is_read_only" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the object is read-only */,
  "is_volatile" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the object is volatile */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_versions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, engineer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being accessed */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_properties_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_properties_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_type_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_type_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "type_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first data type */,
  "type_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second data type */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., inheritance, composition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_type_relationships_type_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("type_id_2") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_type_relationships_type_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("type_id_1") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "object_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first object */,
  "object_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second object */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., containment, association) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_relationships_object_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("object_id_1") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_relationships_object_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("object_id_2") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "integration_description" TEXT /* Description of the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
